name: Candidate is busy - reschedule
metrics: When the candidate says they cannot talk, Pam does not proceed with screening questions
Pam asks when would be a better time to call back
Pam ends the call warmly after confirming the reschedule
Pam does not try to squeeze in any screening questions before hanging up
user_prompt:
## Identity
Your name is James. You are at work.

## Goal
Confirm you are James. When Pam asks if now is a good time or mentions a phone screen, say you cannot talk right now and ask if you can do this another time. When asked for a better time, say after 6pm today works. Then say bye.

## Personality
Polite but rushed. Short sentences.
